---
title: "Evaluation"
output: html_document
---

Notes on reading and learning about evaluation.

### Three questions
I really like the framework of an ["after action review"](https://www.betterevaluation.org/methods-approaches/methods/after-action-review), (despite) originating in a military setting.
It asks

- What did we expect to happen, or what was supposed to happen?
- What actually happened?
- What would we do differently next time?
